default_fallback: I'm not quite sure about that request, but our support team has been notified! Alternatively, you can contact us directly at mixoop@gmail.com.

responses.reply: Hello! Welcome to the Mixoop Ecosystem. I'm here to help you navigate our unified SaaS solutions. How can I assist you today?

Our pricing is tailored to your needs! The basic plan starts at 2000 Rs/month. For larger organizations, our Enterprise cloud tier scales flexibly with your infrastructure usage. Would you like to speak to sales for a custom quote?
I understand you need more specific help. Transferring your conversation session to a live agent right now. Please hold for a moment...

Mixoop is a unified SaaS ecosystem designed to streamline your business operations. Through a single Mixoop account, you get seamless Single Sign-On (SSO) access to all our powerful tools, including HRMS, Processos, and Formflow.
Our HRMS (hrms.mixoop.com) is a comprehensive Human Resources Management System that helps you manage employee data, attendance, payroll, and more, all connected to your main Mixoop identity.
Processos (processos.mixoop.com) is our dedicated workflow and operations management tool. It allows you to automate, track, and optimize your business processes seamlessly.
Formflow (formflow.mixoop.com) lets you create custom forms, surveys, and data collection flows with ease. Submissions are instantly tied to your unified ecosystem data.

We use a centralized Identity Hub (accounts.mixoop.com). Once you log in there securely, you get instant, automatic access across all your Mixoop apps (HRMS, Processos, Formflow) without needing to sign in again!
Our sales team would love to show you how Mixoop can transform your business! You can book a demo by emailing us at mixoop@gmail.com, or I can connect you to a representative right now.

Security is our top priority. We use strict database isolation for our products (e.g., dedicated DBs for Auth, HRMS, and Processos) and utilize secure JWT-based authentication for safe, cross-domain sessions.

For the developers out there: Mixoop is proudly built on the MERN stack with a centralized Identity Provider using OpenID Connect (OIDC) principles and MongoDB Atlas for our isolated database clusters!
Thank you for visiting Mixoop! Have a great day. Let us know if you need anything else in the future.
